title: Minecraft+
description: ✨ The ultimate modpack for modern Minecraft! ✨
body:
![The Minecraft+ banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34eeecee793aa63a808cec2f571c39a8347044f9_0.webp)

---

### What Is Minecraft+?

Minecraft+ is a modpack aimed to add every essential mod to the game without downloading them yourself!

### Advantages:

> **More Performance**

> **Smoother Launch**

> **Easy To Install**

> **Voice Chat**

> **Friend System**

> **Uses Newest Version**

> **In-game Skin Changer**

> **Controller Support**

> **Emotes**

> **Chat Symbols And Fonts**

> **And More!**

### Installion:

Play by installing to **OR** downloading from launchers including the following:

>  [The Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) **[(?)](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)**

> [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)

### Additions:

> For realistic physics, get [Physics Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/Xy8aRQKS)

> For VR support get [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/project/wGoQDPN5)

>  To record and view clips in Minecraft get [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/project/4das1Fjq)

---

_**Note:** This modpack is **NOT** coming to [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/)_
